nonPublicSkills.description: Skill slugs that exist on disk but must not appear in README Taxonomy (consumer-internal skills)

customize.description: Customize inject options for IDE hooks and `skeleton customize resolve`

alwaysInclude.description: Basenames under .skeleton/customize/ appended whenever a skill customize injects (even if the slug file is missing or empty)

plugins.description: Plugin entry paths relative to .skeleton/; each entry must have a built sibling .mjs (run skeleton build-plugin)

draftPathPrefixes.description: Allow-list prefixes for draft-marker prose-policy placement (plus _draft-*.md filenames). Not scan.exclude.
